description: Perfect for casual wear, this floater from id is the best gift you can offer your feet.UpperFabric straps for durability and easy maintenance Cloth lining for a snug, comfortable Fit on the foot Velcro closures for a snug, customised fitSmall scoops on the cushioned PU footbed to allow air flow and support acupressure MidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight feel and shock absorptionOutsoleRound lugs on a durable rubber outsole for absolute gripCareWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
